segments.speaker: Host
segments.text: Hey, you must be Jongkuk. Welcome.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, nice to meet you. Thanks for waiting. My flight took forever.

segments.speaker: Host
segments.text: No problem. Let me give you the quick version.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That would be great. I'm a little out of it after the flight.

segments.speaker: Host
segments.text: This key is for the front door, and this one is for your room. Wi-Fi is written on the card by the desk.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. Is there anything I should know about laundry or trash?

segments.speaker: Host
segments.text: Laundry is downstairs. Trash and recycling are in the back of the building.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. And are there quiet hours I should be aware of?

segments.speaker: Host
segments.text: Around ten on weeknights. Nothing too strict, just be mindful.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Of course. I may just shower and sleep tonight.

segments.speaker: Host
segments.text: Sounds like a plan. Let me know if you need anything.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks again. I really appreciate the easy check-in.
